code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test15-MAR-2018Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine and proteinuria, suggesting possible renal impairment. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, protein, glucose, ketones, bilirubin) further support renal dysfunction and possible tubular involvement. Low total CO₂ may indicate mild metabolic acidosis. HbA1c is low, ruling out chronic hyperglycemia. Recommend nephrology evaluation and further workup for underlying renal pathology.
